units.title: Vocational Education and Training in Furniture Making

learning_outcomes.description: Understand skills acquisition and its relevance to individual and the economy

performance_criteria.description: Define skills acquisition
State the contribution of skills acquisition to the economy
Explain the prospect of skill acquisition to the individual

learning_outcomes.description: Understand the Physical and Mental requirements for acquiring skills in furniture making

performance_criteria.description: List the Physical requirements for acquiring skills in furniture making
Discuss the Mental requirements of acquiring skills in furniture making
Apply the attributes and qualities of the requirements of acquiring skills in furniture making

learning_outcomes.description: Understand the concept of furniture making

performance_criteria.description: Discuss furniture making as a profession
Discuss the importance of furniture making to the Nigerian Economy
Explain the various uses of furniture items
Identify the icons on the menu of a computer
List the icons on the menu of a computer
Locate the position of the icons on the menu of a computer

learning_outcomes.description: Know how to observe safety regulations when using a computer

performance_criteria.description: State the safety rules to be observed in the use and handling of a computer
Adhere to safety in the use and handling of a computer
Recognize unsafe acts in using a computer
State the importance of safeguarding the information in a computer
State the functions of the icons in the menu of a computer
Operate the icons in the menu of a computer
Describe how to download pictures using a computer
Explain how to place an advertisement using a computer
State the procedure for opening an e-mail account
Describe how to connect to the internet

learning_outcomes.description: Using Cell Phone in Bank Transaction

performance_criteria.description: State the procedure for opening a bank account with a cell phone
Explain the procedure for money transfer using a cell phone
Check Bank Account
Perform Internet Banking
Pay utility bills and other services

learning_outcomes.description: Know the various applications of a cell phone.

performance_criteria.description: Snap pictures of projects using a cell phone
Place an advert using a cell phone
Open and use an E-mail address using a cell phone
Connect to the internet and download information using a cell phone
